tools.name: kb_search
tools.description: Semantic search over the security knowledge base. Read-only.

tools.name: kb_get
tools.description: Fetch one entity by its id. Read-only.

tools.name: kb_related
tools.description: Traverse typed relationships from an entity. Read-only.

tools.name: kb_list
tools.description: List all entities of a given type. Read-only.

tools.name: kb_map
tools.description: Map a framework external id (e.g. LLM01) to threat, controls, and Cloudflare primitives. Read-only.

tools.name: kb_classify
tools.description: KB-grounded advisory threat classification for a piece of text. Returns the top-k matching threats with recommended controls. Read-only.

tools.name: kb_checklist
tools.description: Build an actionable security checklist of controls and guidance for a described component, query, or segment. Read-only.

tools.name: kb_compliance_map
tools.description: Map security controls to compliance requirements they satisfy (e.g. SOC 2, ISO 27001, NIST). Optionally filter by framework. Read-only.
